description: This finding informs you that a host within AWS has attempted to run AWS API operations using temporary AWS credentials that were created on an ECS resource in your AWS environment.

findingDetails.findingDescription: This finding informs you that a host outside of AWS has attempted to run AWS API operations using temporary AWS credentials that were created on an ECS resource in your AWS environment.
This finding informs you that a host within AWS has attempted to run AWS API operations using temporary AWS credentials that were created on an ECS resource in your AWS environment.
